metadata.description: Agent Skills for the Bitol data standards (ODCS, ODPS). Each skill is independently installable and self-contained — vendored upstream references plus a hand-written meaning layer.

plugins.name: odcs-yaml
plugins.description: Open Data Contract Standard (ODCS) reference for the YAML data contract format. Covers structure, semantics, top-level sections, the v3 object/property/element schema model, and version differences. Supports ODCS 3.0.0, 3.0.1, 3.0.2, and 3.1.0.

plugins.name: odps-yaml
plugins.description: Open Data Product Standard (ODPS) reference for the YAML data product format. Covers data products, input/output/management ports, and the relationship between ODPS data products and ODCS data contracts. Supports ODPS 1.0.0.

plugins.name: odcs-python
plugins.description: Open Data Contract Standard (ODCS) Python implementation reference for the open-data-contract-standard PyPI package. Covers the OpenDataContractStandard Pydantic model, parsing, constructing, validating, the spec-to-pip-module version map, and common gotchas. Supports ODCS spec 3.0.1, 3.0.2, and 3.1.0.
